  • Classes in org.jbox2d.testbed.framework used by org.jbox2d.testbed.framework
    Class
    Description
    AbstractTestbedController
    This class contains most control logic for the testbed and the update loop.

    AbstractTestbedController.UpdateBehavior
     
    ContactPoint
    Contact point for TestbedTest.
    TestbedCamera
     
    TestbedCamera.ZoomType
     
    TestbedErrorHandler
     
    TestbedModel
    Model for the testbed
    TestbedModel.ListItem
     
    TestbedModel.TestChangedListener
     
    TestbedPanel
    A TestbedPanel encapsulates the graphical panel displayed to the user.
    TestbedSetting
    Defines a setting used in the testbed.
    TestbedSetting.ConstraintType
    The type of value this setting pertains to
    TestbedSetting.SettingType
    Whether the setting affects the engine's behavior or modifies drawing.
    TestbedSettings
    Stores all the testbed settings.
    TestbedTest
